sidebar.tagline: Main navigation for your financial workspace.
sidebar.mobileDescription: Navigate between dashboard, transactions, catalogs and profile.

onboarding.step1Desc: Your personal finance tracker. This takes a minute — you can skip it anytime.
onboarding.step2Desc: Track your accounts in USD, EUR or VES. Each one keeps its own balance, and Platica calculates the equivalent between currencies for you.
onboarding.step3Desc: Add income, expenses and transfers between accounts from the "New transaction" button. Cross-currency transfers use the day's BCV rate automatically.
onboarding.step4Desc: The "Rates" section shows the official USD, EUR and USDT history. Choose which currency you want your equivalences shown in with the $ / € / USDT toggle.
onboarding.step5Desc: Set budgets per category and track debts you owe or are owed — it all shows up on your Dashboard.
onboarding.step6Desc: The Dashboard sums it all up: cash flow, spending by category, and trends. You can replay this tour anytime from the "Help" button in the menu.

rates.title: Exchange Rates
rates.subtitle: Official Dollar, Euro and USDT, with daily history.
rates.fallbackNote: (latest available value, no rate for today)
rates.noData: No data for the selected range.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track your finances with clarity
dashboard.emptyTitle: You don't have any accounts yet
dashboard.emptyDescription: Create your first account to start logging transactions — the Dashboard fills up with charts automatically once you have activity.
